name: codex-conductor
description: Coordinate Codex projects and sessions with lightweight execution, curated MCPs, skills, and non-blocking hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Session orchestration plus a lightweight engineering capability pack.
interface.longDescription: Codex Conductor bundles visible project/session orchestration, a direct Conductor Lite lane with proportional engineering-quality defaults, curated code-intelligence MCPs, focused engineering skills, and non-blocking project-context hooks.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Conductor to split this task into worker sessions.
Use Conductor Lite to finish this change directly, apply proportional engineering quality, and run one focused verification pass.
Show the active project and collect child results.
Create a project-scoped dispatch plan for this goal.
